table.name: agg_sales_store_daily
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT fact_sales_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_daily.store_code, fact_sales_daily.sales_source, fact_sales_daily.channel, fact_sales_daily.sku, fact_sales_daily.qty, fact_sales_daily.gross_sales, fact_sales_daily.discount_amount, fact_sales_daily.net_sales, fact_sales_daily.cogs, fact_sales_daily.orders, fact_sales_daily.customers FROM mart.fact_sales_daily ) SELECT base.sale_date, base.store_code, sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS net_sales, sum(COALESCE(base.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(base.discount_amount, (0)::numeric)) AS discount_amount, sum(COALESCE(base.qty, (0)::numeric)) AS units, (sum(COALESCE(base.orders, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS orders, sum(COALESCE(base.cogs, (0)::numeric)) AS cogs, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (base.cogs IS NOT NULL)) AS rows_with_cogs, count(*) AS rows_total, sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) FILTER (WHERE (base.sales_source = 'pos'::text)) AS net_sales_pos, sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) FILTER (WHERE (base.sales_source = 'distributor'::text)) AS net_sales_distributor, count(DISTINCT base.sku) AS distinct_skus, count(DISTINCT base.channel) AS distinct_channels, (sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) - sum(COALESCE(base.cogs, (0)::numeric))) AS gross_profit, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)), (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) - sum(COALESCE(base.cogs, (0)::numeric))) / NULLIF(sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)), (0)::numeric)) END AS gross_margin_pct FROM base GROUP BY base.sale_date, base.store_code;

table.name: alerts_low_margin
table.viewSql: WITH max_sales_date AS ( SELECT max(fact_sales_daily.sale_date) AS max_sale_date FROM mart.fact_sales_daily ), recent_sales AS ( SELECT s.sale_date, s.store_code, s.sku, s.channel, COALESCE(s.gross_sales, (0)::numeric) AS gross_sales, COALESCE(s.discount_amount, (0)::numeric) AS discount_amount, COALESCE(s.net_sales, (0)::numeric) AS net_sales, COALESCE(s.cogs, (0)::numeric) AS cogs FROM (mart.fact_sales_daily s CROSS JOIN max_sales_date d) WHERE ((s.sale_date >= (d.max_sale_date - '27 days'::interval)) AND (s.sale_date <= d.max_sale_date)) ), alert_grain AS ( SELECT recent_sales.store_code, recent_sales.sku, recent_sales.channel, count(*) AS source_day_count, sum(recent_sales.gross_sales) AS gross_sales, sum(recent_sales.discount_amount) AS discount_amount, sum(recent_sales.net_sales) AS net_sales, sum(recent_sales.cogs) AS cogs, (sum(recent_sales.net_sales) - sum(recent_sales.cogs)) AS gross_margin, CASE WHEN (sum(recent_sales.net_sales) = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((sum(recent_sales.net_sales) - sum(recent_sales.cogs)) / NULLIF(sum(recent_sales.net_sales), (0)::numeric)) END AS gross_margin_pct, CASE WHEN (sum(recent_sales.gross_sales) = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum(recent_sales.discount_amount) / NULLIF(sum(recent_sales.gross_sales), (0)::numeric)) END AS discount_rate FROM recent_sales GROUP BY recent_sales.store_code, recent_sales.sku, recent_sales.channel ), labeled_alerts AS ( SELECT alert_grain.store_code, alert_grain.sku, alert_grain.channel, alert_grain.source_day_count, alert_grain.gross_sales, alert_grain.discount_amount, alert_grain.net_sales, alert_grain.cogs, alert_grain.gross_margin, alert_grain.gross_margin_pct, alert_grain.discount_rate, CASE WHEN (alert_grain.net_sales < (100)::numeric) THEN 'monitor'::text WHEN ((alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.25) AND (alert_grain.net_sales >= (500)::numeric)) THEN 'critical'::text WHEN ((alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.30) AND (alert_grain.net_sales >= (250)::numeric)) THEN 'high'::text WHEN (alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.35) THEN 'medium'::text ELSE 'healthy'::text END AS severity, CASE WHEN (alert_grain.net_sales < (100)::numeric) THEN 'Sales volume is low; monitor before taking action.'::text WHEN ((alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.25) AND (alert_grain.net_sales >= (500)::numeric)) THEN 'Gross margin is below 25% on meaningful sales volume.'::text WHEN ((alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.30) AND (alert_grain.net_sales >= (250)::numeric)) THEN 'Gross margin is below 30% on moderate sales volume.'::text WHEN (alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.35) THEN 'Gross margin is below the watchlist threshold.'::text ELSE 'Margin appears healthy.'::text END AS why_flagged, CASE WHEN (alert_grain.net_sales < (100)::numeric) THEN 'Monitor; sales volume is too low for a strong decision.'::text WHEN ((alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.25) AND (alert_grain.discount_rate >= 0.20)) THEN 'Review promo depth and discounting strategy.'::text WHEN (alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.25) THEN 'Investigate pricing, COGS, or product margin erosion.'::text WHEN ((alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.30) AND (alert_grain.discount_rate >= 0.15)) THEN 'Check whether discounts are reducing margin below target.'::text WHEN (alert_grain.gross_margin_pct < 0.35) THEN 'Add to margin watchlist and compare against trend.'::text ELSE 'No immediate action required.'::text END AS recommended_action FROM alert_grain ) SELECT labeled_alerts.store_code, labeled_alerts.sku, labeled_alerts.channel, labeled_alerts.source_day_count, labeled_alerts.gross_sales, labeled_alerts.discount_amount, labeled_alerts.net_sales, labeled_alerts.cogs, labeled_alerts.gross_margin, labeled_alerts.gross_margin_pct, labeled_alerts.discount_rate, labeled_alerts.severity, labeled_alerts.why_flagged, labeled_alerts.recommended_action, dense_rank() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN (labeled_alerts.severity = 'critical'::text) THEN 1 WHEN (labeled_alerts.severity = 'high'::text) THEN 2 WHEN (labeled_alerts.severity = 'medium'::text) THEN 3 WHEN (labeled_alerts.severity = 'monitor'::text) THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, labeled_alerts.net_sales DESC) AS alert_priority_rank FROM labeled_alerts WHERE (labeled_alerts.severity = ANY (ARRAY['critical'::text, 'high'::text, 'medium'::text, 'monitor'::text]));

table.name: controls_dim_join_coverage
table.viewSql: WITH sales AS ( SELECT 'mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily'::text AS fact_model, count(*) AS n_fact_rows, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ds.store_code IS NULL)) AS n_missing_dim_store, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (dk.sku IS NULL)) AS n_missing_dim_sku, count(*) FILTER (WHERE ((ds.store_code IS NULL) OR (dk.sku IS NULL))) AS n_missing_any_dim, ((count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ds.store_code IS NULL)))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(*), 0))::numeric) AS pct_missing_dim_store, ((count(*) FILTER (WHERE (dk.sku IS NULL)))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(*), 0))::numeric) AS pct_missing_dim_sku, ((count(*) FILTER (WHERE ((ds.store_code IS NULL) OR (dk.sku IS NULL))))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(*), 0))::numeric) AS pct_missing_any_dim FROM ((mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily f LEFT JOIN mart.dim_store ds ON ((ds.store_code = f.store_code))) LEFT JOIN mart.dim_sku dk ON ((dk.sku = f.sku))) ), labor AS ( SELECT 'mart.fact_labor_daily'::text AS fact_model, count(*) AS n_fact_rows, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ds.store_code IS NULL)) AS n_missing_dim_store, (0)::bigint AS n_missing_dim_sku, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ds.store_code IS NULL)) AS n_missing_any_dim, ((count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ds.store_code IS NULL)))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(*), 0))::numeric) AS pct_missing_dim_store, NULL::numeric AS pct_missing_dim_sku, ((count(*) FILTER (WHERE (ds.store_code IS NULL)))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(*), 0))::numeric) AS pct_missing_any_dim FROM (mart.fact_labor_daily f LEFT JOIN mart.dim_store ds ON ((ds.store_code = f.store_code))) ) SELECT sales.fact_model, sales.n_fact_rows, sales.n_missing_dim_store, sales.n_missing_dim_sku, sales.n_missing_any_dim, sales.pct_missing_dim_store, sales.pct_missing_dim_sku, sales.pct_missing_any_dim FROM sales UNION ALL SELECT labor.fact_model, labor.n_fact_rows, labor.n_missing_dim_store, labor.n_missing_dim_sku, labor.n_missing_any_dim, labor.pct_missing_dim_store, labor.pct_missing_dim_sku, labor.pct_missing_any_dim FROM labor;

table.name: controls_duplicate_source_records
table.viewSql: WITH candidate_records AS ( SELECT 'electricity_bills'::text AS source_system, (stg_ghg_electricity_bills.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_month, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.scope, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.facility_id, NULL::text AS product_line_id, 'electricity'::text AS activity_category, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.factor_type, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_amount, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_unit, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.invoice_amount_usd AS cost_usd, stg_ghg_electricity_bills.invoice_number AS evidence_reference, 'activity_month + facility_id + meter_number + invoice_number + activity_amount + activity_unit'::text AS duplicate_key_definition, md5(concat_ws('|'::text, 'electricity_bills', COALESCE((stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_month)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_electricity_bills.facility_id, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_electricity_bills.meter_number, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_electricity_bills.invoice_number, '<null>'::text), COALESCE((stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_amount)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_electricity_bills.activity_unit, '<null>'::text))) AS duplicate_business_key FROM stg.stg_ghg_electricity_bills UNION ALL SELECT 'fuel_usage'::text AS source_system, (stg_ghg_fuel_usage.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_month, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.scope, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.facility_id, NULL::text AS product_line_id, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.fuel_type AS activity_category, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.factor_type, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_amount, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_unit, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.cost_usd, stg_ghg_fuel_usage.invoice_number AS evidence_reference, 'activity_month + facility_id + fuel_type + invoice_number + activity_amount + activity_unit'::text AS duplicate_key_definition, md5(concat_ws('|'::text, 'fuel_usage', COALESCE((stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_month)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_fuel_usage.facility_id, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_fuel_usage.fuel_type, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_fuel_usage.invoice_number, '<null>'::text), COALESCE((stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_amount)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_fuel_usage.activity_unit, '<null>'::text))) AS duplicate_business_key FROM stg.stg_ghg_fuel_usage UNION ALL SELECT 'shipping_miles'::text AS source_system, (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_month, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.scope, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.facility_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.product_line_id, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipping_mode AS activity_category, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.factor_type, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_amount, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_unit, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.freight_cost_usd AS cost_usd, stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_id AS evidence_reference, CASE WHEN (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_id IS NOT NULL) THEN 'shipment_id'::text ELSE 'shipment_date + facility_id + destination_state + product_line_id + shipping_mode + carrier + activity_amount'::text END AS duplicate_key_definition, CASE WHEN (stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_id IS NOT NULL) THEN md5(concat_ws('|'::text, 'shipping_miles', 'shipment_id', stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_id)) ELSE md5(concat_ws('|'::text, 'shipping_miles', 'missing_shipment_id', COALESCE((stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipment_date)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_shipping_miles.facility_id, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_shipping_miles.destination_state, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_shipping_miles.product_line_id, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_shipping_miles.shipping_mode, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_shipping_miles.carrier, '<null>'::text), COALESCE((stg_ghg_shipping_miles.activity_amount)::text, '<null>'::text))) END AS duplicate_business_key FROM stg.stg_ghg_shipping_miles UNION ALL SELECT 'packaging_materials'::text AS source_system, (stg_ghg_packaging_materials.raw_row_id)::text AS source_record_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_month, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.scope, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.facility_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.product_line_id, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.material_type AS activity_category, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.factor_type, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_amount, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_unit, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.cost_usd, stg_ghg_packaging_materials.invoice_number AS evidence_reference, 'activity_month + facility_id + product_line_id + material_type + invoice_number + activity_amount + activity_unit'::text AS duplicate_key_definition, md5(concat_ws('|'::text, 'packaging_materials', COALESCE((stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_month)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_packaging_materials.facility_id, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_packaging_materials.product_line_id, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_packaging_materials.material_type, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_packaging_materials.invoice_number, '<null>'::text), COALESCE((stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_amount)::text, '<null>'::text), COALESCE(stg_ghg_packaging_materials.activity_unit, '<null>'::text))) AS duplicate_business_key FROM stg.stg_ghg_packaging_materials ), duplicate_groups AS ( SELECT candidate_records.source_system, candidate_records.duplicate_business_key, candidate_records.duplicate_key_definition, count(*) AS duplicate_record_count, string_agg(candidate_records.source_record_id, ', '::text ORDER BY (candidate_records.source_record_id)::bigint) AS duplicate_source_record_ids, min(candidate_records.activity_month) AS first_activity_month, max(candidate_records.activity_month) AS last_activity_month, sum(candidate_records.activity_amount) AS duplicate_group_activity_amount, sum(candidate_records.cost_usd) AS duplicate_group_cost_usd FROM candidate_records GROUP BY candidate_records.source_system, candidate_records.duplicate_business_key, candidate_records.duplicate_key_definition HAVING (count(*) > 1) ), duplicate_detail AS ( SELECT c.source_system, c.duplicate_key_definition, c.duplicate_business_key, g.duplicate_record_count, g.duplicate_source_record_ids, g.first_activity_month, g.last_activity_month, g.duplicate_group_activity_amount, g.duplicate_group_cost_usd, c.source_record_id, c.activity_month, c.scope, c.facility_id, c.product_line_id, c.activity_category, c.factor_type, c.activity_amount, c.activity_unit, c.cost_usd, c.evidence_reference, fe.activity_id, fe.metric_tons_co2e, fe.is_reportable_emissions_row, fe.qa_status_label FROM ((candidate_records c JOIN duplicate_groups g ON (((c.source_system = g.source_system) AND (c.duplicate_business_key = g.duplicate_business_key)))) LEFT JOIN mart.fact_emissions fe ON (((c.source_system = fe.source_system) AND (c.source_record_id = fe.source_record_id)))) ) SELECT duplicate_detail.source_system, duplicate_detail.duplicate_key_definition, duplicate_detail.duplicate_business_key, duplicate_detail.duplicate_record_count, duplicate_detail.duplicate_source_record_ids, duplicate_detail.first_activity_month, duplicate_detail.last_activity_month, duplicate_detail.duplicate_group_activity_amount, duplicate_detail.duplicate_group_cost_usd, sum(duplicate_detail.metric_tons_co2e) OVER (PARTITION BY duplicate_detail.source_system, duplicate_detail.duplicate_business_key) AS duplicate_group_metric_tons_co2e, duplicate_detail.source_record_id, duplicate_detail.activity_id, duplicate_detail.activity_month, duplicate_detail.scope, duplicate_detail.facility_id, duplicate_detail.product_line_id, duplicate_detail.activity_category, duplicate_detail.factor_type, duplicate_detail.activity_amount, duplicate_detail.activity_unit, duplicate_detail.cost_usd, duplicate_detail.evidence_reference, duplicate_detail.metric_tons_co2e, duplicate_detail.is_reportable_emissions_row, duplicate_detail.qa_status_label FROM duplicate_detail ORDER BY duplicate_detail.source_system, duplicate_detail.first_activity_month, duplicate_detail.duplicate_business_key, (duplicate_detail.source_record_id)::bigint;

table.name: controls_freshness
table.viewSql: WITH models AS ( SELECT v.model_schema, v.model_name, v.date_candidates FROM ( VALUES ('mart'::text,'fact_sales_distributor_daily'::text,ARRAY['sale_date'::text, 'sales_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'fact_sales_pos_daily'::text,ARRAY['sale_date'::text, 'sales_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'fact_sales_daily'::text,ARRAY['sale_date'::text, 'sales_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'fact_labor_daily'::text,ARRAY['work_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'fact_inventory_snapshot_daily'::text,ARRAY['snapshot_date'::text, 'as_of_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'kpi_sales_per_labor_hour_daily'::text,ARRAY['kpi_date'::text, 'sale_date'::text, 'work_date'::text, 'as_of_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'kpi_instock_rate_daily'::text,ARRAY['as_of_date'::text, 'snapshot_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'kpi_days_of_supply'::text,ARRAY['as_of_date'::text, 'snapshot_date'::text, 'date'::text, 'day'::text]), ('mart'::text,'fact_actuals_monthly'::text,ARRAY['month_start'::text, 'month'::text, 'period_start'::text, 'as_of_date'::text, 'date'::text])) v(model_schema, model_name, date_candidates) ), checks AS ( SELECT CURRENT_DATE AS run_date, ((models.model_schema || '.'::text) || models.model_name) AS model_name, mart._latest_date(models.model_schema, models.model_name, models.date_candidates) AS latest_date FROM models ), scored AS ( SELECT checks.run_date, checks.model_name, checks.latest_date, CASE WHEN (checks.latest_date IS NULL) THEN NULL::integer ELSE (CURRENT_DATE - checks.latest_date) END AS days_lag FROM checks ) SELECT scored.run_date, scored.model_name, scored.latest_date, scored.days_lag, CASE WHEN (scored.latest_date IS NULL) THEN 'Fail'::text WHEN (scored.days_lag <= 2) THEN 'Pass'::text WHEN (scored.days_lag <= 7) THEN 'Warning'::text ELSE 'Fail'::text END AS status FROM scored ORDER BY scored.model_name;

table.name: controls_missing_dim_joins
table.viewSql: SELECT fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.product_line_id, fact_emissions.evidence_reference, fact_emissions.has_missing_facility_join, fact_emissions.has_missing_product_line_join FROM mart.fact_emissions WHERE (fact_emissions.has_missing_facility_join OR fact_emissions.has_missing_product_line_join) ORDER BY fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.product_line_id;

table.name: controls_missing_factor_joins
table.viewSql: SELECT fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.factor_type, fact_emissions.activity_unit, count(*) AS missing_factor_row_count, min(fact_emissions.activity_month) AS first_activity_month, max(fact_emissions.activity_month) AS last_activity_month FROM mart.fact_emissions WHERE fact_emissions.has_missing_factor_join GROUP BY fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.factor_type, fact_emissions.activity_unit ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC;

table.name: controls_negative_activity
table.viewSql: SELECT fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.product_line_id, fact_emissions.activity_category, fact_emissions.factor_type, fact_emissions.activity_amount, fact_emissions.activity_unit, fact_emissions.evidence_reference FROM mart.fact_emissions WHERE fact_emissions.has_negative_activity ORDER BY fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.facility_id;

table.name: controls_rowcounts_daily
table.viewSql: WITH params AS ( SELECT (CURRENT_DATE - 90) AS start_date ), rc AS ( SELECT CURRENT_DATE AS run_date, 'mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily'::text AS model_name, f.sale_date AS grain_date, count(*) AS row_count FROM (mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily f JOIN params p ON ((f.sale_date >= p.start_date))) GROUP BY CURRENT_DATE, 'mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily'::text, f.sale_date UNION ALL SELECT CURRENT_DATE AS run_date, 'mart.fact_labor_daily'::text AS model_name, f.work_date AS grain_date, count(*) AS row_count FROM (mart.fact_labor_daily f JOIN params p ON ((f.work_date >= p.start_date))) GROUP BY CURRENT_DATE, 'mart.fact_labor_daily'::text, f.work_date UNION ALL SELECT CURRENT_DATE AS run_date, 'mart.kpi_sales_per_labor_hour_daily'::text AS model_name, k.kpi_date AS grain_date, count(*) AS row_count FROM (mart.kpi_sales_per_labor_hour_daily k JOIN params p ON ((k.kpi_date >= p.start_date))) GROUP BY CURRENT_DATE, 'mart.kpi_sales_per_labor_hour_daily'::text, k.kpi_date ) SELECT rc.run_date, rc.model_name, rc.grain_date, rc.row_count FROM rc ORDER BY rc.model_name, rc.grain_date;

table.name: controls_unknown_activity_type
table.viewSql: SELECT fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.product_line_id, fact_emissions.activity_category, fact_emissions.factor_type, fact_emissions.activity_amount, fact_emissions.activity_unit, fact_emissions.evidence_reference, fact_emissions.has_unknown_activity_type, fact_emissions.has_missing_factor_join, fact_emissions.qa_status_label FROM mart.fact_emissions WHERE fact_emissions.has_unknown_activity_type ORDER BY fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.source_system, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.activity_category;

table.name: decision_kpi_driver_tree
table.viewSql: SELECT driver_tree.business_area, driver_tree.parent_metric, driver_tree.child_metric, driver_tree.metric_level, driver_tree.driver_type, driver_tree.decision_question, driver_tree.example_decision, driver_tree.recommended_output FROM ( VALUES ('Revenue'::text,'Net Sales'::text,'Units Sold'::text,2,'Volume'::text,'Did revenue change because we sold more or fewer units?'::text,'Investigate demand, distribution coverage, inventory availability, or store/account performance.'::text,'mart.decision_revenue_variance_root_cause'::text), ('Revenue'::text,'Net Sales'::text,'Average Net Price'::text,2,'Price'::text,'Did revenue change because realized selling price changed?'::text,'Review pricing, discounting, promo depth, or channel pricing strategy.'::text,'mart.decision_revenue_variance_root_cause'::text), ('Revenue'::text,'Net Sales'::text,'Discount Rate'::text,2,'Price / Promo'::text,'Did revenue or margin change because discounting increased?'::text,'Review promo ROI, reduce unnecessary discounting, or adjust price floors.'::text,'mart.alerts_low_margin'::text), ('Revenue'::text,'Net Sales'::text,'Channel Mix'::text,2,'Mix'::text,'Did revenue change because sales shifted across channels?'::text,'Rebalance retail, wholesale, and distributor strategy.'::text,'mart.decision_revenue_variance_root_cause'::text), ('Revenue'::text,'Net Sales'::text,'Store / Account Mix'::text,2,'Mix'::text,'Did revenue change because performance shifted across stores or accounts?'::text,'Focus field support on underperforming or high-opportunity stores.'::text,'mart.store_performance_flags'::text), ('Revenue'::text,'Net Sales'::text,'SKU Mix'::text,2,'Mix'::text,'Did revenue change because product mix shifted?'::text,'Prioritize high-growth or high-margin SKUs.'::text,'mart.opportunity_high_growth_skus'::text), ('Margin'::text,'Gross Margin %'::text,'Net Sales'::text,2,'Revenue Base'::text,'Is margin changing because revenue changed?'::text,'Grow sales where margin remains healthy.'::text,'mart.alerts_low_margin'::text), ('Margin'::text,'Gross Margin %'::text,'COGS'::text,2,'Cost'::text,'Is margin changing because cost of goods changed?'::text,'Investigate product cost, cost assumptions, or SKU-level margin erosion.'::text,'mart.alerts_low_margin'::text), ('Margin'::text,'Gross Margin %'::text,'Discount Amount'::text,2,'Promo'::text,'Is margin changing because discount dollars increased?'::text,'Review discounting strategy and promo effectiveness.'::text,'mart.alerts_low_margin'::text), ('Margin'::text,'Gross Margin %'::text,'SKU Mix'::text,2,'Mix'::text,'Is margin changing because sales shifted toward lower- or higher-margin products?'::text,'Promote higher-margin SKUs or investigate low-margin growth.'::text,'mart.opportunity_high_growth_skus'::text), ('Margin'::text,'Gross Margin %'::text,'Channel Mix'::text,2,'Mix'::text,'Is margin changing because revenue shifted across channels?'::text,'Review wholesale, distributor, and retail economics.'::text,'mart.decision_revenue_variance_root_cause'::text), ('Inventory Health'::text,'In-Stock Rate'::text,'On-Hand Units'::text,2,'Supply'::text,'Do we have enough inventory available to support demand?'::text,'Replenish fast-moving SKUs or reduce excess stock.'::text,'mart.alerts_inventory_risk'::text), ('Inventory Health'::text,'In-Stock Rate'::text,'Backordered Units'::text,2,'Supply Risk'::text,'Are customers or stores experiencing fulfillment gaps?'::text,'Prioritize replenishment where backorders are concentrated.'::text,'mart.alerts_inventory_risk'::text), ('Inventory Health'::text,'Days of Supply'::text,'Units Sold'::text,2,'Demand Velocity'::text,'Is demand velocity high enough to create stockout risk?'::text,'Increase supply for fast-moving SKUs.'::text,'mart.alerts_inventory_risk'::text), ('Inventory Health'::text,'Days of Supply'::text,'Shipments'::text,2,'Fulfillment'::text,'Are shipments keeping up with demand?'::text,'Investigate supply chain or fulfillment delays.'::text,'mart.alerts_inventory_risk'::text), ('Inventory Health'::text,'In-Stock Rate'::text,'SKU Distribution Status'::text,2,'Assortment'::text,'Is the SKU actually carried where demand exists?'::text,'Expand distribution or clean assortment setup.'::text,'mart.opportunity_high_growth_skus'::text), ('Labor Efficiency'::text,'Sales per Labor Hour'::text,'Net Sales'::text,2,'Output'::text,'Are labor hours producing enough revenue?'::text,'Compare staffing levels to sales activity.'::text,'mart.store_performance_flags'::text), ('Labor Efficiency'::text,'Sales per Labor Hour'::text,'Labor Hours'::text,2,'Input'::text,'Are labor hours aligned with sales activity?'::text,'Review staffing levels and scheduling assumptions.'::text,'mart.store_performance_flags'::text), ('Labor Efficiency'::text,'Sales per Labor Hour'::text,'Labor Cost'::text,2,'Cost'::text,'Is labor cost creating pressure relative to sales?'::text,'Monitor labor cost pressure and store productivity.'::text,'mart.store_performance_flags'::text), ('Labor Efficiency'::text,'Sales per Labor Hour'::text,'OT Hours'::text,2,'Overtime'::text,'Is overtime increasing without matching sales growth?'::text,'Reduce overtime or rebalance staffing.'::text,'mart.store_performance_flags'::text), ('Labor Efficiency'::text,'Sales per Labor Hour'::text,'Store Mix'::text,2,'Location Mix'::text,'Are efficiency issues concentrated in specific stores?'::text,'Investigate underperforming locations.'::text,'mart.store_performance_flags'::text)) driver_tree(business_area, parent_metric, child_metric, metric_level, driver_type, decision_question, example_decision, recommended_output);

table.name: decision_revenue_variance_root_cause
table.viewSql: WITH max_sales_date AS ( SELECT max(fact_sales_daily.sale_date) AS max_sale_date FROM mart.fact_sales_daily ), sales_window AS ( SELECT s.sale_date, s.store_code, s.sku, s.channel, COALESCE(s.qty, (0)::numeric) AS units_sold, COALESCE(s.net_sales, (0)::numeric) AS net_sales FROM (mart.fact_sales_daily s CROSS JOIN max_sales_date m) WHERE ((s.sale_date >= (m.max_sale_date - '55 days'::interval)) AND (s.sale_date <= m.max_sale_date)) ), periodized_sales AS ( SELECT sales_window.sale_date, sales_window.store_code, sales_window.sku, sales_window.channel, sales_window.units_sold, sales_window.net_sales, CASE WHEN (sales_window.sale_date >= ( SELECT (max_sales_date.max_sale_date - '27 days'::interval) FROM max_sales_date)) THEN 'current_28_days'::text WHEN ((sales_window.sale_date >= ( SELECT (max_sales_date.max_sale_date - '55 days'::interval) FROM max_sales_date)) AND (sales_window.sale_date < ( SELECT (max_sales_date.max_sale_date - '27 days'::interval) FROM max_sales_date))) THEN 'prior_28_days'::text ELSE 'outside_window'::text END AS comparison_period FROM sales_window ), period_rollup AS ( SELECT periodized_sales.comparison_period, periodized_sales.store_code, periodized_sales.sku, periodized_sales.channel, sum(periodized_sales.units_sold) AS units_sold, sum(periodized_sales.net_sales) AS net_sales FROM periodized_sales WHERE (periodized_sales.comparison_period = ANY (ARRAY['current_28_days'::text, 'prior_28_days'::text])) GROUP BY periodized_sales.comparison_period, periodized_sales.store_code, periodized_sales.sku, periodized_sales.channel ), comparison_pivot AS ( SELECT period_rollup.store_code, period_rollup.sku, period_rollup.channel, sum( CASE WHEN (period_rollup.comparison_period = 'current_28_days'::text) THEN period_rollup.units_sold ELSE (0)::numeric END) AS current_units_sold, sum( CASE WHEN (period_rollup.comparison_period = 'prior_28_days'::text) THEN period_rollup.units_sold ELSE (0)::numeric END) AS prior_units_sold, sum( CASE WHEN (period_rollup.comparison_period = 'current_28_days'::text) THEN period_rollup.net_sales ELSE (0)::numeric END) AS current_net_sales, sum( CASE WHEN (period_rollup.comparison_period = 'prior_28_days'::text) THEN period_rollup.net_sales ELSE (0)::numeric END) AS prior_net_sales FROM period_rollup GROUP BY period_rollup.store_code, period_rollup.sku, period_rollup.channel ), variance_calc AS ( SELECT comparison_pivot.store_code, comparison_pivot.sku, comparison_pivot.channel, comparison_pivot.current_units_sold, comparison_pivot.prior_units_sold, comparison_pivot.current_net_sales, comparison_pivot.prior_net_sales, (comparison_pivot.current_net_sales - comparison_pivot.prior_net_sales) AS net_sales_variance, CASE WHEN (comparison_pivot.prior_net_sales = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((comparison_pivot.current_net_sales - comparison_pivot.prior_net_sales) / NULLIF(comparison_pivot.prior_net_sales, (0)::numeric)) END AS net_sales_variance_pct, CASE WHEN (comparison_pivot.current_units_sold = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (comparison_pivot.current_net_sales / NULLIF(comparison_pivot.current_units_sold, (0)::numeric)) END AS current_avg_net_price, CASE WHEN (comparison_pivot.prior_units_sold = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (comparison_pivot.prior_net_sales / NULLIF(comparison_pivot.prior_units_sold, (0)::numeric)) END AS prior_avg_net_price FROM comparison_pivot ), driver_calc AS ( SELECT variance_calc.store_code, variance_calc.sku, variance_calc.channel, variance_calc.current_units_sold, variance_calc.prior_units_sold, variance_calc.current_net_sales, variance_calc.prior_net_sales, variance_calc.net_sales_variance, variance_calc.net_sales_variance_pct, variance_calc.current_avg_net_price, variance_calc.prior_avg_net_price, ((variance_calc.current_units_sold - variance_calc.prior_units_sold) * COALESCE(variance_calc.prior_avg_net_price, variance_calc.current_avg_net_price, (0)::numeric)) AS estimated_volume_effect, ((COALESCE(variance_calc.current_avg_net_price, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(variance_calc.prior_avg_net_price, (0)::numeric)) * variance_calc.current_units_sold) AS estimated_price_effect FROM variance_calc ), labeled AS ( SELECT driver_calc.store_code, driver_calc.sku, driver_calc.channel, driver_calc.current_units_sold, driver_calc.prior_units_sold, driver_calc.current_net_sales, driver_calc.prior_net_sales, driver_calc.net_sales_variance, driver_calc.net_sales_variance_pct, driver_calc.current_avg_net_price, driver_calc.prior_avg_net_price, driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect, driver_calc.estimated_price_effect, CASE WHEN ((driver_calc.prior_net_sales = (0)::numeric) AND (driver_calc.current_net_sales > (0)::numeric)) THEN 'New / growing business'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.prior_net_sales > (0)::numeric) AND (driver_calc.current_net_sales = (0)::numeric)) THEN 'Lost / declining business'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance < (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect) >= abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect))) THEN 'Volume-driven decline'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance < (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect) > abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect))) THEN 'Price-driven decline'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance > (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect) >= abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect))) THEN 'Volume-driven growth'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance > (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect) > abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect))) THEN 'Price-driven growth'::text ELSE 'Stable / low movement'::text END AS primary_revenue_driver, CASE WHEN ((driver_calc.prior_net_sales = (0)::numeric) AND (driver_calc.current_net_sales > (0)::numeric)) THEN 'Review what changed and consider expanding distribution or support.'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.prior_net_sales > (0)::numeric) AND (driver_calc.current_net_sales = (0)::numeric)) THEN 'Investigate lost sales, distribution gaps, account issues, or discontinued demand.'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance < (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect) >= abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect))) THEN 'Investigate demand decline, inventory availability, account performance, or lost distribution.'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance < (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect) > abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect))) THEN 'Review pricing, discounting, promo activity, or channel price pressure.'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance > (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect) >= abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect))) THEN 'Protect supply and consider expanding high-performing store/SKU/channel combinations.'::text WHEN ((driver_calc.net_sales_variance > (0)::numeric) AND (abs(driver_calc.estimated_price_effect) > abs(driver_calc.estimated_volume_effect))) THEN 'Review whether price improvement is sustainable without hurting demand.'::text ELSE 'Monitor; no immediate action required.'::text END AS recommended_action FROM driver_calc ) SELECT labeled.store_code, labeled.sku, labeled.channel, labeled.current_units_sold, labeled.prior_units_sold, labeled.current_net_sales, labeled.prior_net_sales, labeled.net_sales_variance, labeled.net_sales_variance_pct, labeled.current_avg_net_price, labeled.prior_avg_net_price, labeled.estimated_volume_effect, labeled.estimated_price_effect, labeled.primary_revenue_driver, labeled.recommended_action, dense_rank() OVER (ORDER BY (abs(labeled.net_sales_variance)) DESC) AS variance_impact_rank FROM labeled;

table.name: dim_date
table.viewSql: WITH bounds AS ( SELECT ((CURRENT_DATE - '3 years'::interval))::date AS start_date, ((CURRENT_DATE + '1 year'::interval))::date AS end_date ), dates AS ( SELECT (generate_series((( SELECT bounds.start_date FROM bounds))::timestamp with time zone, (( SELECT bounds.end_date FROM bounds))::timestamp with time zone, '1 day'::interval))::date AS date_day ) SELECT ((((EXTRACT(year FROM dates.date_day))::integer * 10000) + ((EXTRACT(month FROM dates.date_day))::integer * 100)) + (EXTRACT(day FROM dates.date_day))::integer) AS date_key, dates.date_day AS date, (EXTRACT(year FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS year, (EXTRACT(quarter FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS quarter, (EXTRACT(month FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS month, to_char((dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone, 'Mon'::text) AS month_name, to_char((dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS year_month, (EXTRACT(day FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS day_of_month, (EXTRACT(doy FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS day_of_year, (EXTRACT(isoweek FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS iso_week, to_char((dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone, 'IYYY-IW'::text) AS iso_year_week, (EXTRACT(isodow FROM dates.date_day))::integer AS iso_day_of_week, to_char((dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone, 'Dy'::text) AS day_name, (EXTRACT(isodow FROM dates.date_day) = ANY (ARRAY[(6)::numeric, (7)::numeric])) AS is_weekend, (date_trunc('month'::text, (dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone) = dates.date_day) AS is_month_start, (((date_trunc('month'::text, (dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone) + '1 mon -1 days'::interval))::date = dates.date_day) AS is_month_end, (date_trunc('quarter'::text, (dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone) = dates.date_day) AS is_quarter_start, (((date_trunc('quarter'::text, (dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone) + '3 mons -1 days'::interval))::date = dates.date_day) AS is_quarter_end, (date_trunc('year'::text, (dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone) = dates.date_day) AS is_year_start, (((date_trunc('year'::text, (dates.date_day)::timestamp with time zone) + '1 year -1 days'::interval))::date = dates.date_day) AS is_year_end FROM dates;

table.name: dim_employee
table.viewSql: WITH employee_universe AS ( SELECT DISTINCT int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id FROM "int".int_labor_daily_employee WHERE (int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id IS NOT NULL) UNION SELECT DISTINCT int_timeclock_punches_latest.employee_id FROM "int".int_timeclock_punches_latest WHERE (int_timeclock_punches_latest.employee_id IS NOT NULL) ), labor_profile AS ( SELECT int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id, min(int_labor_daily_employee.work_date) AS first_work_date, max(int_labor_daily_employee.work_date) AS last_work_date, count(DISTINCT int_labor_daily_employee.work_date) AS n_work_days, sum(COALESCE(int_labor_daily_employee.hours_worked, (0)::numeric)) AS total_hours_worked, sum(COALESCE(int_labor_daily_employee.minutes_worked, (0)::numeric)) AS total_minutes_worked, (sum(COALESCE(int_labor_daily_employee.n_events, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS total_punch_events, (sum(COALESCE(int_labor_daily_employee.n_shift_pairs, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS total_shift_pairs, (sum(COALESCE(int_labor_daily_employee.n_unpaired_in, (0)::bigint)))::bigint AS total_unpaired_in, min(int_labor_daily_employee.min_ingested_at) AS min_ingested_at, max(int_labor_daily_employee.max_ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, min(int_labor_daily_employee.min_drop_date) AS min_drop_date, max(int_labor_daily_employee.max_drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM "int".int_labor_daily_employee GROUP BY int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id ), labor_last_store AS ( SELECT DISTINCT int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id, first_value(int_labor_daily_employee.store_code) OVER (PARTITION BY int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id ORDER BY int_labor_daily_employee.work_date DESC NULLS LAST) AS last_store_code FROM "int".int_labor_daily_employee ), punch_profile AS ( SELECT int_timeclock_punches_latest.employee_id, min(int_timeclock_punches_latest.punch_ts) AS first_punch_ts, max(int_timeclock_punches_latest.punch_ts) AS last_punch_ts, min(int_timeclock_punches_latest.punch_date) AS first_punch_date, max(int_timeclock_punches_latest.punch_date) AS last_punch_date FROM "int".int_timeclock_punches_latest GROUP BY int_timeclock_punches_latest.employee_id ) SELECT e.employee_id, ls.last_store_code, lp.first_work_date, lp.last_work_date, pp.first_punch_ts, pp.last_punch_ts, lp.n_work_days, lp.total_hours_worked, lp.total_minutes_worked, lp.total_punch_events, lp.total_shift_pairs, lp.total_unpaired_in, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(lp.n_work_days, 0) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (lp.total_hours_worked / (NULLIF(lp.n_work_days, 0))::numeric) END AS avg_hours_per_workday, lp.min_ingested_at, lp.max_ingested_at, lp.min_drop_date, lp.max_drop_date FROM (((employee_universe e LEFT JOIN labor_profile lp ON ((lp.employee_id = e.employee_id))) LEFT JOIN labor_last_store ls ON ((ls.employee_id = e.employee_id))) LEFT JOIN punch_profile pp ON ((pp.employee_id = e.employee_id)));

table.name: dim_sku
table.viewSql: WITH sku_universe AS ( SELECT DISTINCT int_sales_distributor_dedup.sku FROM "int".int_sales_distributor_dedup WHERE (int_sales_distributor_dedup.sku IS NOT NULL) UNION SELECT DISTINCT int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.sku FROM "int".int_sku_distribution_status_dedup WHERE (int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.sku IS NOT NULL) ), sales_profile AS ( SELECT int_sales_distributor_dedup.sku, max(int_sales_distributor_dedup.product_name) FILTER (WHERE (int_sales_distributor_dedup.product_name IS NOT NULL)) AS product_name, min(int_sales_distributor_dedup.sale_date) AS first_sale_date, max(int_sales_distributor_dedup.sale_date) AS last_sale_date, max(int_sales_distributor_dedup.ingested_at) AS sales_max_ingested_at, max(int_sales_distributor_dedup.drop_date) AS sales_max_drop_date FROM "int".int_sales_distributor_dedup GROUP BY int_sales_distributor_dedup.sku ), dist_ranked AS ( SELECT d.as_of_date, d.store_code, d.sku, d.distribution_status, d.status_reason, d.as_of_date_raw, d.store_code_raw, d.sku_raw, d.distribution_status_raw, d.is_missing_key, d.is_duplicate_candidate, d.load_id, d.source_system, d.cadence, d.drop_date, d.ingested_at, d.dup_group_size, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY d.sku ORDER BY d.as_of_date DESC NULLS LAST, d.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, d.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, d.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM "int".int_sku_distribution_status_dedup d ), dist_current AS ( SELECT dist_ranked.sku, dist_ranked.as_of_date AS distribution_as_of_date, dist_ranked.distribution_status AS distribution_status_current, dist_ranked.status_reason AS distribution_status_reason, dist_ranked.ingested_at AS dist_max_ingested_at, dist_ranked.drop_date AS dist_max_drop_date FROM dist_ranked WHERE (dist_ranked.rn = 1) ) SELECT u.sku, sp.product_name, sp.first_sale_date, sp.last_sale_date, dc.distribution_status_current, dc.distribution_status_reason, dc.distribution_as_of_date, sp.sales_max_ingested_at, sp.sales_max_drop_date, dc.dist_max_ingested_at, dc.dist_max_drop_date FROM ((sku_universe u LEFT JOIN sales_profile sp ON ((sp.sku = u.sku))) LEFT JOIN dist_current dc ON ((dc.sku = u.sku)));

table.name: dim_store
table.viewSql: SELECT d.store_code, d.dispensary_id, d.dispensary_name, d.state, d.city, d.postal_code, d.license_id, d.account_type, s.account_status, s.status_reason AS account_status_reason, s.status_date AS account_status_date, (lower(s.account_status) = 'active'::text) AS is_active_account, (lower(s.account_status) = ANY (ARRAY['inactive'::text, 'suspended'::text])) AS is_inactive_or_suspended, d.as_of_date AS dispensary_as_of_date, d.ingested_at AS dispensary_ingested_at, s.ingested_at AS status_ingested_at FROM ("int".int_dispensary_latest d LEFT JOIN "int".int_account_status_current s ON ((s.store_code = d.store_code)));

table.name: fact_actuals_monthly
table.viewSql: SELECT stg_finance_actuals.period_month, stg_finance_actuals.kpi_category, stg_finance_actuals.currency_code, sum(COALESCE(stg_finance_actuals.actual_amount, (0)::numeric)) AS actual_amount, count(*) AS n_source_rows, count(*) FILTER (WHERE stg_finance_actuals.is_unmapped_metric) AS n_unmapped_rows, max(stg_finance_actuals.ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, max(stg_finance_actuals.drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM stg.stg_finance_actuals WHERE ((stg_finance_actuals.period_month IS NOT NULL) AND (stg_finance_actuals.kpi_category IS NOT NULL)) GROUP BY stg_finance_actuals.period_month, stg_finance_actuals.kpi_category, stg_finance_actuals.currency_code;

table.name: fact_distribution_coverage
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.as_of_date, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.store_code, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.sku, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.distribution_status, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.status_reason, max(int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.ingested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.as_of_date, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.store_code, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.sku) AS max_ingested_at, max(int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.drop_date) OVER (PARTITION BY int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.as_of_date, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.store_code, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.sku) AS max_drop_date FROM "int".int_sku_distribution_status_dedup ), typed AS ( SELECT b.as_of_date, b.store_code, b.sku, b.distribution_status, b.status_reason, b.max_ingested_at, b.max_drop_date, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['carried'::text, 'listed'::text, 'active'::text, 'in_distribution'::text, 'available'::text])) AS is_carried, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'pending_launch'::text, 'onboarding'::text])) AS is_pending, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['not_carried'::text, 'not_listed'::text, 'inactive'::text])) AS is_not_carried, (b.distribution_status = ANY (ARRAY['discontinued'::text, 'retired'::text])) AS is_discontinued FROM base b ), ranged AS ( SELECT t.as_of_date, t.store_code, t.sku, t.distribution_status, t.status_reason, t.max_ingested_at, t.max_drop_date, t.is_carried, t.is_pending, t.is_not_carried, t.is_discontinued, lead(t.as_of_date) OVER (PARTITION BY t.store_code, t.sku ORDER BY t.as_of_date) AS next_as_of_date FROM typed t ) SELECT ranged.as_of_date, ranged.store_code, ranged.sku, ranged.distribution_status, ranged.status_reason, ranged.is_carried, ranged.is_pending, ranged.is_not_carried, ranged.is_discontinued, ranged.as_of_date AS effective_start_date, ((ranged.next_as_of_date - '1 day'::interval))::date AS effective_end_date, ranged.max_ingested_at, ranged.max_drop_date FROM ranged;

table.name: fact_emissions
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT int_ghg_activity_with_factors.activity_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.source_system, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.source_record_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.activity_month, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.scope, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.facility_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.facility_name, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.facility_type, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.state_province, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.country, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.grid_region, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.product_line_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.product_line_name, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.product_family, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.activity_category, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.factor_type, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.activity_amount, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.activity_unit, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.cost_usd, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.evidence_reference, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.factor_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.factor_version, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.source_authority, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.kg_co2e, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.metric_tons_co2e, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_negative_activity, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_facility_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_product_line_id, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_invalid_activity_month, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_unknown_activity_type, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_facility_join, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_product_line_join, int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_factor_join, CASE WHEN (int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_negative_activity OR int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_facility_id OR int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_invalid_activity_month OR int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_unknown_activity_type OR int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_facility_join OR int_ghg_activity_with_factors.has_missing_factor_join) THEN false ELSE true END AS is_reportable_emissions_row FROM "int".int_ghg_activity_with_factors ) SELECT base.activity_id, base.source_system, base.source_record_id, base.activity_month, base.scope, base.facility_id, base.facility_name, base.facility_type, base.state_province, base.country, base.grid_region, base.product_line_id, base.product_line_name, base.product_family, base.activity_category, base.factor_type, base.activity_amount, base.activity_unit, base.cost_usd, base.evidence_reference, base.factor_id, base.factor_version, base.source_authority, base.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit, base.kg_co2e, base.metric_tons_co2e, base.has_negative_activity, base.has_missing_facility_id, base.has_missing_product_line_id, base.has_invalid_activity_month, base.has_unknown_activity_type, base.has_missing_facility_join, base.has_missing_product_line_join, base.has_missing_factor_join, base.is_reportable_emissions_row, CASE WHEN base.has_missing_factor_join THEN '❌ Missing factor join'::text WHEN base.has_negative_activity THEN '⚠️ Negative activity'::text WHEN base.has_missing_facility_id THEN '⚠️ Missing facility ID'::text WHEN base.has_invalid_activity_month THEN '⚠️ Invalid activity month'::text WHEN base.has_unknown_activity_type THEN '⚠️ Unknown activity type'::text WHEN base.has_missing_facility_join THEN '⚠️ Missing facility join'::text WHEN base.has_missing_product_line_join THEN '⚠️ Missing product line join'::text WHEN base.is_reportable_emissions_row THEN '✅ Reportable'::text ELSE '⚠️ Review'::text END AS qa_status_label FROM base;

table.name: fact_forecast_vs_actual_weekly
table.viewSql: SELECT int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.week_start_date, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.store_code, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.state, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.region, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.sku, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.product_name, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.product_family, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.channel, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.plan_version, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_units, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_units, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.unit_variance, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.sales_variance, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.sales_variance_pct, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_unit_price, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_unit_price, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.absolute_sales_error, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.absolute_percent_error, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_performance_status, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.is_missing_actual, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.is_partial_actual, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.promo_flag, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.stockout_flag, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.seasonality_label, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.business_event, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.loaded_at FROM "int".int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly;

table.name: fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
table.viewSql: SELECT int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.snapshot_date, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.site_code AS store_code, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.sku, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.on_hand, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.on_hand_nonnegative AS on_hand_safe, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.in_stock_flag, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.received_units, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.shipped_units, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.requested_units, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.backordered_units, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.is_negative_inventory, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.is_missing_key, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.load_id, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.source_system, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.cadence, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.drop_date, int_inventory_snapshot_dedup.ingested_at FROM "int".int_inventory_snapshot_dedup;

table.name: fact_labor_daily
table.viewSql: SELECT int_labor_daily.work_date, int_labor_daily.store_code, int_labor_daily.hours_worked, int_labor_daily.minutes_worked, int_labor_daily.n_employees, int_labor_daily.n_events AS n_punches, int_labor_daily.n_shift_pairs, int_labor_daily.n_unpaired_in, int_labor_daily.n_out_events, int_labor_daily.avg_hours_per_employee, int_labor_daily.max_ingested_at, int_labor_daily.max_drop_date FROM "int".int_labor_daily;

table.name: fact_labor_daily_employee
table.viewSql: SELECT int_labor_daily_employee.work_date, int_labor_daily_employee.store_code, int_labor_daily_employee.employee_id, int_labor_daily_employee.hours_worked, int_labor_daily_employee.minutes_worked, int_labor_daily_employee.n_events AS n_punches, int_labor_daily_employee.n_shift_pairs, int_labor_daily_employee.n_unpaired_in, int_labor_daily_employee.n_out_events, int_labor_daily_employee.min_ingested_at, int_labor_daily_employee.max_ingested_at, int_labor_daily_employee.min_drop_date, int_labor_daily_employee.max_drop_date FROM "int".int_labor_daily_employee;

table.name: fact_sales_daily
table.viewSql: SELECT fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_distributor_daily.store_code, fact_sales_distributor_daily.sku, fact_sales_distributor_daily.channel, 'distributor'::text AS sales_source, fact_sales_distributor_daily.product_name, fact_sales_distributor_daily.qty, fact_sales_distributor_daily.gross_sales, fact_sales_distributor_daily.discount_amount, fact_sales_distributor_daily.net_sales, fact_sales_distributor_daily.cogs, fact_sales_distributor_daily.orders, fact_sales_distributor_daily.customers, fact_sales_distributor_daily.unit_list_price_wavg, fact_sales_distributor_daily.unit_net_price_wavg, fact_sales_distributor_daily.discount_rate_implied, fact_sales_distributor_daily.n_source_rows, fact_sales_distributor_daily.n_dup_candidate_rows, fact_sales_distributor_daily.max_ingested_at, fact_sales_distributor_daily.max_drop_date FROM mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily UNION ALL SELECT fact_sales_pos_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_pos_daily.store_code, fact_sales_pos_daily.sku, fact_sales_pos_daily.channel, 'pos'::text AS sales_source, fact_sales_pos_daily.product_name, fact_sales_pos_daily.qty, fact_sales_pos_daily.gross_sales, fact_sales_pos_daily.discount_amount, fact_sales_pos_daily.net_sales, fact_sales_pos_daily.cogs, fact_sales_pos_daily.orders, fact_sales_pos_daily.customers, fact_sales_pos_daily.unit_list_price_wavg, fact_sales_pos_daily.unit_net_price_wavg, fact_sales_pos_daily.discount_rate_implied, fact_sales_pos_daily.n_source_rows, fact_sales_pos_daily.n_dup_candidate_rows, fact_sales_pos_daily.max_ingested_at, fact_sales_pos_daily.max_drop_date FROM mart.fact_sales_pos_daily;

table.name: fact_sales_distributor_daily
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT int_sales_distributor_dedup.sale_date, int_sales_distributor_dedup.store_code, int_sales_distributor_dedup.sku, int_sales_distributor_dedup.channel, int_sales_distributor_dedup.product_name, int_sales_distributor_dedup.qty, int_sales_distributor_dedup.gross_sales, int_sales_distributor_dedup.discount_amount, int_sales_distributor_dedup.net_sales, int_sales_distributor_dedup.cogs, int_sales_distributor_dedup.orders, int_sales_distributor_dedup.customers, int_sales_distributor_dedup.unit_list_price, int_sales_distributor_dedup.unit_net_price, int_sales_distributor_dedup.discount_rate, COALESCE(int_sales_distributor_dedup.dup_group_size, (1)::bigint) AS dup_group_size, int_sales_distributor_dedup.ingested_at, int_sales_distributor_dedup.drop_date FROM "int".int_sales_distributor_dedup WHERE ((int_sales_distributor_dedup.sale_date IS NOT NULL) AND (int_sales_distributor_dedup.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (int_sales_distributor_dedup.sku IS NOT NULL) AND (int_sales_distributor_dedup.channel IS NOT NULL)) ), agg AS ( SELECT base.sale_date, base.store_code, base.sku, base.channel, max(base.product_name) FILTER (WHERE (base.product_name IS NOT NULL)) AS product_name, (sum(COALESCE(base.qty, 0)))::numeric AS qty, sum(COALESCE(base.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(base.discount_amount, (0)::numeric)) AS discount_amount, sum(COALESCE(base.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS net_sales, sum(COALESCE(base.cogs, (0)::numeric)) AS cogs, sum(COALESCE(base.orders, 0)) AS orders, sum(COALESCE(base.customers, 0)) AS customers, CASE WHEN (NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(base.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum((COALESCE(base.unit_list_price, (0)::numeric) * (COALESCE(base.qty, 0))::numeric)) / NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(base.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) END AS unit_list_price_wavg, CASE WHEN (NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(base.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum((COALESCE(base.unit_net_price, (0)::numeric) * (COALESCE(base.qty, 0))::numeric)) / NULLIF((sum(COALESCE(base.qty, 0)))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) END AS unit_net_price_wavg, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(sum(COALESCE(base.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)), (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum(COALESCE(base.discount_amount, (0)::numeric)) / NULLIF(sum(COALESCE(base.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)), (0)::numeric)) END AS discount_rate_implied, (max(base.dup_group_size))::integer AS n_source_rows, GREATEST(((max(base.dup_group_size))::integer - 1), 0) AS n_dup_candidate_rows, max(base.ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, max(base.drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM base GROUP BY base.sale_date, base.store_code, base.sku, base.channel ) SELECT agg.sale_date, agg.store_code, agg.sku, agg.channel, agg.product_name, agg.qty, agg.gross_sales, agg.discount_amount, agg.net_sales, agg.cogs, agg.orders, agg.customers, agg.unit_list_price_wavg, agg.unit_net_price_wavg, agg.discount_rate_implied, agg.n_source_rows, agg.n_dup_candidate_rows, agg.max_ingested_at, agg.max_drop_date FROM agg;

table.name: fact_sales_pos_daily
table.viewSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT p.load_id, p.source_system, p.cadence, p.drop_date, p.ingested_at, p.txn_id, p.txn_ts_raw, p.txn_ts_parsed, p.txn_date, p.store_code, p.store_code_raw, p.sku, p.product_sku_raw, p.qty, p.qty_raw, p.unit_price, p.unit_price_raw, p.discount_pct, p.discount_pct_raw, p.gross_amount, p.gross_amount_raw, p.net_amount, p.net_amount_raw, p.is_missing_key, p.is_duplicate_candidate, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY p.txn_id ORDER BY (p.txn_ts_parsed IS NOT NULL) DESC, (p.store_code IS NOT NULL) DESC, (p.sku IS NOT NULL) DESC, p.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, p.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, p.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM stg.stg_pos_transactions p WHERE (p.txn_id IS NOT NULL) ), dedup AS ( SELECT ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.txn_id, ranked.txn_ts_raw, ranked.txn_ts_parsed, ranked.txn_date, ranked.store_code, ranked.store_code_raw, ranked.sku, ranked.product_sku_raw, ranked.qty, ranked.qty_raw, ranked.unit_price, ranked.unit_price_raw, ranked.discount_pct, ranked.discount_pct_raw, ranked.gross_amount, ranked.gross_amount_raw, ranked.net_amount, ranked.net_amount_raw, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.is_duplicate_candidate, ranked.rn FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1) ), daily AS ( SELECT dedup.txn_date AS sale_date, dedup.store_code, dedup.sku, count(*) AS n_source_rows, count(DISTINCT dedup.txn_id) AS orders, (sum(COALESCE(dedup.qty, 0)))::numeric AS qty, (sum(COALESCE(dedup.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric AS gross_sales, (sum(COALESCE(dedup.net_amount, (0)::double precision)))::numeric AS net_sales, ((sum(COALESCE(dedup.gross_amount, (0)::double precision)) - sum(COALESCE(dedup.net_amount, (0)::double precision))))::numeric AS discount_amount, max(dedup.ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, max(dedup.drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM dedup WHERE ((dedup.txn_date IS NOT NULL) AND (dedup.store_code IS NOT NULL) AND (dedup.sku IS NOT NULL)) GROUP BY dedup.txn_date, dedup.store_code, dedup.sku ) SELECT d.sale_date, d.store_code, d.sku, 'retail'::text AS channel, s.product_name, d.qty, d.gross_sales, d.discount_amount, d.net_sales, NULL::numeric AS cogs, d.orders, NULL::bigint AS customers, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(d.qty, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (d.gross_sales / NULLIF(d.qty, (0)::numeric)) END AS unit_list_price_wavg, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(d.qty, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (d.net_sales / NULLIF(d.qty, (0)::numeric)) END AS unit_net_price_wavg, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(d.gross_sales, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (d.discount_amount / NULLIF(d.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) END AS discount_rate_implied, d.n_source_rows, NULL::bigint AS n_dup_candidate_rows, d.max_ingested_at, d.max_drop_date FROM (daily d LEFT JOIN mart.dim_sku s ON ((s.sku = d.sku)));

table.name: fact_shipments_daily
table.viewSql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT s.load_id, s.source_system, s.cadence, s.drop_date, s.ingested_at, s.ship_date, s.ship_date_raw, s.shipment_id, s.shipment_id_raw, s.site_code, s.site_code_raw, s.sku, s.sku_raw, s.units_shipped, s.units_shipped_raw, s.carrier, s.carrier_raw, s.is_missing_key, s.is_duplicate_candidate, s.is_negative_units, s.is_missing_units, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY s.ship_date, s.site_code, s.sku, COALESCE(s.shipment_id, s.load_id) ORDER BY (s.is_missing_key = false) DESC, (COALESCE(s.is_negative_units, false) = false) DESC, s.ingested_at DESC NULLS LAST, s.drop_date DESC NULLS LAST, s.load_id DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM stg.stg_wms_shipments s WHERE ((s.ship_date IS NOT NULL) AND (s.site_code IS NOT NULL) AND (s.sku IS NOT NULL)) ), dedup AS ( SELECT ranked.load_id, ranked.source_system, ranked.cadence, ranked.drop_date, ranked.ingested_at, ranked.ship_date, ranked.ship_date_raw, ranked.shipment_id, ranked.shipment_id_raw, ranked.site_code, ranked.site_code_raw, ranked.sku, ranked.sku_raw, ranked.units_shipped, ranked.units_shipped_raw, ranked.carrier, ranked.carrier_raw, ranked.is_missing_key, ranked.is_duplicate_candidate, ranked.is_negative_units, ranked.is_missing_units, ranked.rn FROM ranked WHERE (ranked.rn = 1) ) SELECT dedup.ship_date, dedup.site_code AS store_code, dedup.sku, count(*) AS n_source_rows, count(DISTINCT dedup.shipment_id) AS n_shipments, (sum(COALESCE(dedup.units_shipped, 0)))::numeric AS units_shipped, max(dedup.carrier) FILTER (WHERE (dedup.carrier IS NOT NULL)) AS carrier_any, max(dedup.ingested_at) AS max_ingested_at, max(dedup.drop_date) AS max_drop_date FROM dedup GROUP BY dedup.ship_date, dedup.site_code, dedup.sku;

table.name: fact_sku_distribution_status_daily
table.viewSql: SELECT int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.as_of_date, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.store_code, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.sku, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.distribution_status, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.status_reason, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.load_id, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.source_system, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.cadence, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.drop_date, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.ingested_at, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.is_missing_key, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.is_duplicate_candidate, int_sku_distribution_status_dedup.dup_group_size FROM "int".int_sku_distribution_status_dedup;

table.name: fact_variance_bridge_weekly
table.viewSql: SELECT int_price_volume_mix_variance.week_start_date, int_price_volume_mix_variance.channel, int_price_volume_mix_variance.plan_version, sum(int_price_volume_mix_variance.forecast_net_sales) AS forecast_net_sales, sum(int_price_volume_mix_variance.volume_effect) AS volume_effect, sum(int_price_volume_mix_variance.price_effect) AS price_effect, sum(int_price_volume_mix_variance.mix_or_residual_effect) AS mix_or_residual_effect, sum(int_price_volume_mix_variance.actual_net_sales) AS actual_net_sales, sum(int_price_volume_mix_variance.total_sales_variance) AS total_sales_variance, count(*) AS row_count, count(int_price_volume_mix_variance.actual_net_sales) AS rows_with_actuals, (count(*) - count(int_price_volume_mix_variance.actual_net_sales)) AS rows_missing_actuals FROM "int".int_price_volume_mix_variance WHERE (int_price_volume_mix_variance.actual_net_sales IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY int_price_volume_mix_variance.week_start_date, int_price_volume_mix_variance.channel, int_price_volume_mix_variance.plan_version;

table.name: kpi_breakeven_monthly
table.viewSql: WITH actuals AS ( SELECT fact_actuals_monthly.period_month, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'net_sales'::text)) AS net_sales, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'cogs'::text)) AS cogs, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'labor_cost'::text)) AS labor_cost FROM mart.fact_actuals_monthly GROUP BY fact_actuals_monthly.period_month ), sales_mart AS ( SELECT (date_trunc('month'::text, (fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date)::timestamp with time zone))::date AS period_month, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_distributor_daily.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS mart_net_sales FROM mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily GROUP BY ((date_trunc('month'::text, (fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date)::timestamp with time zone))::date) ), joined AS ( SELECT a.period_month, a.net_sales, a.cogs, (a.net_sales - a.cogs) AS gross_margin, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(a.net_sales, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((a.net_sales - a.cogs) / NULLIF(a.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) END AS gross_margin_pct, a.labor_cost, s.mart_net_sales FROM (actuals a LEFT JOIN sales_mart s ON ((s.period_month = a.period_month))) ), days AS ( SELECT j.period_month, j.net_sales, j.cogs, j.gross_margin, j.gross_margin_pct, j.labor_cost, j.mart_net_sales, CASE WHEN ((j.mart_net_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (j.mart_net_sales <> (0)::numeric)) THEN (j.mart_net_sales / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month'::text, (j.period_month)::timestamp with time zone) + '1 mon -1 days'::interval))) WHEN ((j.net_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (j.net_sales <> (0)::numeric)) THEN (j.net_sales / EXTRACT(day FROM (date_trunc('month'::text, (j.period_month)::timestamp with time zone) + '1 mon -1 days'::interval))) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS avg_daily_net_sales_in_month FROM joined j ) SELECT days.period_month, days.net_sales AS actual_net_sales, days.cogs, days.gross_margin, days.gross_margin_pct, days.labor_cost, CASE WHEN ((NULLIF(days.gross_margin_pct, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) OR (days.labor_cost IS NULL)) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (days.labor_cost / NULLIF(days.gross_margin_pct, (0)::numeric)) END AS breakeven_net_sales_for_labor, days.avg_daily_net_sales_in_month, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(days.avg_daily_net_sales_in_month, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE CASE WHEN ((NULLIF(days.gross_margin_pct, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) OR (days.labor_cost IS NULL)) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((days.labor_cost / NULLIF(days.gross_margin_pct, (0)::numeric)) / NULLIF(days.avg_daily_net_sales_in_month, (0)::numeric)) END END AS breakeven_days_estimate FROM days ORDER BY days.period_month DESC;

table.name: kpi_days_of_supply
table.viewSql: WITH inv AS ( SELECT fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.snapshot_date, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.store_code, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.sku, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.on_hand_safe FROM mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily ), sales_daily AS ( SELECT fact_sales_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_daily.store_code, fact_sales_daily.sku, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_daily.qty, (0)::numeric)) AS units_sold FROM mart.fact_sales_daily GROUP BY fact_sales_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_daily.store_code, fact_sales_daily.sku ) SELECT i.snapshot_date, i.store_code, i.sku, i.on_hand_safe, s.units_28d, (s.units_28d / 28.0) AS avg_daily_units_28d, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(s.units_28d, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((i.on_hand_safe)::numeric / NULLIF((s.units_28d / 28.0), (0)::numeric)) END AS days_of_supply_28d FROM (inv i LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT sum(sd.units_sold) AS units_28d FROM sales_daily sd WHERE ((sd.store_code = i.store_code) AND (sd.sku = i.sku) AND ((sd.sale_date >= ((i.snapshot_date - '27 days'::interval))::date) AND (sd.sale_date <= i.snapshot_date)))) s ON (true));

table.name: kpi_emissions_intensity_monthly
table.viewSql: SELECT fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.facility_name, fact_emissions.facility_type, fact_emissions.product_line_id, fact_emissions.product_line_name, count(*) AS activity_row_count, count(*) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row) AS reportable_row_count, round(sum(fact_emissions.activity_amount) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row), 4) AS reportable_activity_amount, round(sum(fact_emissions.kg_co2e) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row), 4) AS kg_co2e, round(sum(fact_emissions.metric_tons_co2e) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row), 4) AS metric_tons_co2e, round(sum(fact_emissions.cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row), 2) AS cost_usd, CASE WHEN (sum(fact_emissions.cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row) > (0)::numeric) THEN round((sum(fact_emissions.metric_tons_co2e) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row) / sum(fact_emissions.cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE fact_emissions.is_reportable_emissions_row)), 8) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS metric_tons_co2e_per_usd FROM mart.fact_emissions GROUP BY fact_emissions.activity_month, fact_emissions.scope, fact_emissions.facility_id, fact_emissions.facility_name, fact_emissions.facility_type, fact_emissions.product_line_id, fact_emissions.product_line_name;

table.name: kpi_forecast_accuracy_weekly
table.viewSql: SELECT int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.week_start_date, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.channel, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.plan_version, sum(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales) AS forecast_net_sales, sum(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales) AS actual_net_sales, sum((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales)) AS forecast_bias_amount, sum(abs((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales))) AS absolute_sales_error, CASE WHEN (sum(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales) = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum(abs((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales))) / sum(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales)) END AS wape, CASE WHEN (sum(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales) = (0)::numeric) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (sum((int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales - int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales)) / sum(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.forecast_net_sales)) END AS bias_pct, count(*) AS row_count, count(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales) AS rows_with_actuals, (count(*) - count(int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales)) AS rows_missing_actuals FROM "int".int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly WHERE (int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.actual_net_sales IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.week_start_date, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.channel, int_forecast_vs_actual_weekly.plan_version;

table.name: kpi_gross_margin_daily
table.viewSql: WITH sales AS ( SELECT fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_distributor_daily.store_code, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_distributor_daily.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS net_sales, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_distributor_daily.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_distributor_daily.cogs, (0)::numeric)) AS cogs FROM mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily GROUP BY fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_distributor_daily.store_code ) SELECT sales.sale_date, sales.store_code, sales.net_sales, sales.gross_sales, sales.cogs, (sales.net_sales - sales.cogs) AS gross_margin, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(sales.net_sales, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((sales.net_sales - sales.cogs) / NULLIF(sales.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) END AS gross_margin_pct FROM sales;

table.name: kpi_instock_rate_daily
table.viewSql: WITH inv AS ( SELECT fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.snapshot_date, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.store_code, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.sku, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.on_hand_safe, fact_inventory_snapshot_daily.in_stock_flag FROM mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily ), cov AS ( SELECT fact_distribution_coverage.as_of_date, fact_distribution_coverage.store_code, fact_distribution_coverage.sku, fact_distribution_coverage.is_carried FROM mart.fact_distribution_coverage ), joined AS ( SELECT i.snapshot_date, i.store_code, i.sku, i.in_stock_flag, COALESCE(c.is_carried, false) AS is_carried FROM (inv i LEFT JOIN cov c ON (((c.as_of_date = i.snapshot_date) AND (c.store_code = i.store_code) AND (c.sku = i.sku)))) ), agg AS ( SELECT joined.snapshot_date, joined.store_code, count(*) AS n_skus_in_inventory, count(*) FILTER (WHERE joined.in_stock_flag) AS n_skus_in_stock, count(*) FILTER (WHERE joined.is_carried) AS n_skus_carried, count(*) FILTER (WHERE (joined.is_carried AND joined.in_stock_flag)) AS n_carried_skus_in_stock FROM joined GROUP BY joined.snapshot_date, joined.store_code ) SELECT agg.snapshot_date, agg.store_code, agg.n_skus_in_inventory, agg.n_skus_in_stock, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(agg.n_skus_in_inventory, 0) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((agg.n_skus_in_stock)::numeric / (NULLIF(agg.n_skus_in_inventory, 0))::numeric) END AS instock_rate_inventory_universe, agg.n_skus_carried, agg.n_carried_skus_in_stock, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(agg.n_skus_carried, 0) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((agg.n_carried_skus_in_stock)::numeric / (NULLIF(agg.n_skus_carried, 0))::numeric) END AS instock_rate_carried_universe FROM agg;

table.name: kpi_roi_monthly
table.viewSql: WITH a AS ( SELECT fact_actuals_monthly.period_month, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'net_sales'::text)) AS net_sales, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'cogs'::text)) AS cogs, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'gross_margin'::text)) AS gross_margin, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'labor_cost'::text)) AS labor_cost FROM mart.fact_actuals_monthly GROUP BY fact_actuals_monthly.period_month ), derived AS ( SELECT a.period_month, a.net_sales, a.cogs, COALESCE(a.gross_margin, (a.net_sales - a.cogs)) AS gross_margin, a.labor_cost FROM a ) SELECT derived.period_month, derived.net_sales, derived.cogs, derived.gross_margin, derived.labor_cost, (derived.gross_margin - derived.labor_cost) AS contribution_margin, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(derived.labor_cost, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (derived.gross_margin / NULLIF(derived.labor_cost, (0)::numeric)) END AS roi_gross_margin_over_labor, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(derived.labor_cost, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE ((derived.gross_margin - derived.labor_cost) / NULLIF(derived.labor_cost, (0)::numeric)) END AS roi_contribution_over_labor FROM derived ORDER BY derived.period_month DESC;

table.name: kpi_sales_per_labor_hour_daily
table.viewSql: WITH sales_store_day AS ( SELECT fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date AS kpi_date, fact_sales_distributor_daily.store_code, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.net_sales) AS net_sales, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.gross_sales) AS gross_sales, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.discount_amount) AS discount_amount, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.cogs) AS cogs, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.qty) AS units, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.orders) AS orders, sum(fact_sales_distributor_daily.customers) AS customers FROM mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily GROUP BY fact_sales_distributor_daily.sale_date, fact_sales_distributor_daily.store_code ), labor AS ( SELECT fact_labor_daily.work_date AS kpi_date, fact_labor_daily.store_code, fact_labor_daily.hours_worked, fact_labor_daily.n_punches, fact_labor_daily.n_employees FROM mart.fact_labor_daily ) SELECT s.kpi_date, s.store_code, s.net_sales, s.gross_sales, s.discount_amount, s.cogs, s.units, s.orders, s.customers, l.hours_worked, l.n_punches, l.n_employees, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(l.hours_worked, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (s.net_sales / NULLIF(l.hours_worked, (0)::numeric)) END AS net_sales_per_labor_hour, CASE WHEN (NULLIF(l.hours_worked, (0)::numeric) IS NULL) THEN NULL::numeric ELSE (s.gross_sales / NULLIF(l.hours_worked, (0)::numeric)) END AS gross_sales_per_labor_hour FROM (sales_store_day s LEFT JOIN labor l ON (((l.kpi_date = s.kpi_date) AND (l.store_code = s.store_code))));

table.name: recon_sales_distributor_vs_pos
table.viewSql: WITH params AS ( SELECT (CURRENT_DATE - 90) AS start_date, 0.010 AS tolerance_pct ), dist AS ( SELECT f.sale_date, f.store_code, sum(COALESCE(f.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS dist_net_sales, sum(COALESCE(f.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS dist_gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(f.qty, (0)::numeric)) AS dist_qty FROM (mart.fact_sales_distributor_daily f JOIN params p ON ((f.sale_date >= p.start_date))) GROUP BY f.sale_date, f.store_code ), pos AS ( SELECT f.sale_date, f.store_code, sum(COALESCE(f.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS pos_net_sales, sum(COALESCE(f.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS pos_gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(f.qty, (0)::numeric)) AS pos_qty FROM (mart.fact_sales_pos_daily f JOIN params p ON ((f.sale_date >= p.start_date))) GROUP BY f.sale_date, f.store_code ), j AS ( SELECT COALESCE(d.sale_date, p.sale_date) AS sale_date, COALESCE(d.store_code, p.store_code) AS store_code, d.dist_net_sales, p.pos_net_sales, (COALESCE(p.pos_net_sales, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(d.dist_net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS delta_net_sales, d.dist_gross_sales, p.pos_gross_sales, (COALESCE(p.pos_gross_sales, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(d.dist_gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS delta_gross_sales, d.dist_qty, p.pos_qty, (COALESCE(p.pos_qty, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(d.dist_qty, (0)::numeric)) AS delta_qty, CASE WHEN (GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(d.dist_net_sales, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(p.pos_net_sales, (0)::numeric))) = (0)::numeric) THEN (0)::numeric ELSE (abs((COALESCE(p.pos_net_sales, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(d.dist_net_sales, (0)::numeric))) / NULLIF(GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(d.dist_net_sales, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(p.pos_net_sales, (0)::numeric))), (0)::numeric)) END AS delta_pct_net_sales FROM (dist d FULL JOIN pos p ON (((p.sale_date = d.sale_date) AND (p.store_code = d.store_code)))) ) SELECT j.sale_date, j.store_code, j.dist_net_sales, j.pos_net_sales, j.delta_net_sales, j.dist_gross_sales, j.pos_gross_sales, j.delta_gross_sales, j.dist_qty, j.pos_qty, j.delta_qty, j.delta_pct_net_sales, ( SELECT params.tolerance_pct FROM params) AS tolerance_pct, CASE WHEN ((j.sale_date IS NULL) OR (j.store_code IS NULL)) THEN 'Fail'::text WHEN (j.delta_pct_net_sales <= ( SELECT params.tolerance_pct FROM params)) THEN 'Pass'::text WHEN (j.delta_pct_net_sales <= (( SELECT params.tolerance_pct FROM params) * (2)::numeric)) THEN 'Warning'::text ELSE 'Fail'::text END AS status FROM j ORDER BY j.sale_date DESC, j.store_code;

table.name: recon_sales_to_gl_monthly
table.viewSql: WITH params AS ( SELECT 0.02 AS pct_tolerance, 0.035 AS gross_margin_pct_tolerance, (500)::numeric AS abs_tolerance ), mart_monthly AS ( SELECT (date_trunc('month'::text, (fact_sales_daily.sale_date)::timestamp with time zone))::date AS period_month, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_daily.net_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS mart_net_sales, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_daily.gross_sales, (0)::numeric)) AS mart_gross_sales, sum(COALESCE(fact_sales_daily.cogs, (0)::numeric)) AS mart_cogs, sum((COALESCE(fact_sales_daily.net_sales, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(fact_sales_daily.cogs, (0)::numeric))) AS mart_gross_margin FROM mart.fact_sales_daily GROUP BY ((date_trunc('month'::text, (fact_sales_daily.sale_date)::timestamp with time zone))::date) ), gl AS ( SELECT fact_actuals_monthly.period_month, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'net_sales'::text)) AS gl_net_sales, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'gross_sales'::text)) AS gl_gross_sales, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'cogs'::text)) AS gl_cogs, sum(fact_actuals_monthly.actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE (fact_actuals_monthly.kpi_category = 'gross_margin'::text)) AS gl_gross_margin FROM mart.fact_actuals_monthly GROUP BY fact_actuals_monthly.period_month ), rows AS ( SELECT COALESCE(m.period_month, g.period_month) AS period_month, m.mart_net_sales, g.gl_net_sales, m.mart_gross_sales, g.gl_gross_sales, m.mart_cogs, g.gl_cogs, m.mart_gross_margin, g.gl_gross_margin FROM (mart_monthly m FULL JOIN gl g ON ((g.period_month = m.period_month))) ), melt AS ( SELECT rows.period_month, 'net_sales'::text AS metric, rows.mart_net_sales AS mart_amount, rows.gl_net_sales AS gl_amount FROM rows UNION ALL SELECT rows.period_month, 'gross_sales'::text, rows.mart_gross_sales, rows.gl_gross_sales FROM rows UNION ALL SELECT rows.period_month, 'cogs'::text, rows.mart_cogs, rows.gl_cogs FROM rows UNION ALL SELECT rows.period_month, 'gross_margin'::text, rows.mart_gross_margin, rows.gl_gross_margin FROM rows ) SELECT melt.period_month, melt.metric, melt.mart_amount, melt.gl_amount, (COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric)) AS diff_amount, CASE WHEN (GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) = (0)::numeric) THEN (0)::numeric ELSE (abs((COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) / NULLIF(GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))), (0)::numeric)) END AS pct_diff, CASE WHEN (melt.mart_amount IS NULL) THEN 'FAIL_missing_mart'::text WHEN (melt.gl_amount IS NULL) THEN 'FAIL_missing_gl'::text WHEN (abs((COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) <= ( SELECT params.abs_tolerance FROM params)) THEN 'PASS'::text WHEN ((melt.metric = 'gross_margin'::text) AND (GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) > (0)::numeric) AND ((abs((COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) / GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric)))) <= ( SELECT params.gross_margin_pct_tolerance FROM params))) THEN 'PASS'::text WHEN ((melt.metric <> 'gross_margin'::text) AND (GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) > (0)::numeric) AND ((abs((COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric))) / GREATEST(abs(COALESCE(melt.mart_amount, (0)::numeric)), abs(COALESCE(melt.gl_amount, (0)::numeric)))) <= ( SELECT params.pct_tolerance FROM params))) THEN 'PASS'::text ELSE 'FAIL_mismatch'::text END AS status FROM melt ORDER BY melt.period_month DESC, melt.metric;
